creator: jobaldwi@vt.edu
text:
On 13-Feb-99 Stefan Esser wrote:
> On 1999-02-11 04:55 -0800, jobaldwi@vt.edu wrote:
>> >Description:
>> The Wine port failes to patch unless the patch files patch-ap and patch-av
>> are removed.  Once they are gone it builds fine and runs fine, as far as I
>> can tell.
> 
> The patches have been removed when I did the commit.
> 
> Which method did you use to update the Wine port on
> your system ?
> 
> Regards, STefan

I track the CVS repository nightly from cvsup3.freebsd.org via CVSup and update
/usr/ports nightly after the sup finishes.

---
